name: Silence Token
desc: Mute the moment. Increases calm, reduces chaos.

name: Spark Pin
desc: A tiny catalyst. Unlocks certain flirt hotspots later.

name: Rose Note
desc: A memory anchor. Improves late-game reconnection odds.

name: Honesty Catalyst
desc: Forces a moment of truth. Increases trust but may raise resentment.

name: Tension Breaker
desc: Lightens the mood. Reduces resentment and chaos.

name: Trust Key
desc: Unlocks deeper conversation paths and vulnerable moments.

name: Memory Fragment
desc: A shared moment captured. Affects relationship intensity.

name: Regret Anchor
desc: A moment of missed opportunity. Can unlock reconciliation paths.

name: Chaos Amplifier
desc: Embrace the chaos. Increases volatility and wild outcomes.

name: Calm Anchor
desc: Brings peace to a tense moment. Reduces chaos significantly.

name: Attraction Spark
desc: Creates a moment of undeniable chemistry.

name: Forgiveness Token
desc: A gesture of reconciliation. Reduces resentment permanently.

name: Shared Secret
desc: Something only you two know. Deepens connection.

name: Apology Note
desc: A sincere apology. Reduces resentment and builds trust.

name: Jealousy Seed
desc: A moment of insecurity. Can grow into resentment or fuel attraction.

name: Vulnerability Key
desc: Unlocks deep emotional moments and truth-telling scenes.

name: Romance Catalyst
desc: Creates a perfect romantic moment. Increases attraction and trust.

name: Distance Marker
desc: A moment that created space. Can be overcome or deepened.

name: Reconnection Bridge
desc: A path back to each other. Unlocks reconciliation arcs.

name: Commitment Token
desc: A promise made. Affects long-term relationship stability.
